ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget for the movie in the original year's currency */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Domestic box office gross in the original year's currency */,
  "international_gross" INTEGER /* International box office gross in the original year's currency */,
  "budget_2013" INTEGER /* Budget normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "domestic_gross_2013" INTEGER /* Domestic box office gross normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "international_gross_2013" INTEGER /* International box office gross normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES inflation_rates ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "test" TEXT /* The name or type of test conducted */,
  "clean_test" TEXT /* Cleaned or processed version of the test result */,
  "binary_outcome" TEXT /* Binary outcome of the test (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES movies ("imdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data pertains to */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget for the movie in the original year's currency */,
  "domestic_gross" INTEGER /* Domestic box office gross in the original year's currency */,
  "international_gross" INTEGER /* International box office gross in the original year's currency */,
  "budget_2013" INTEGER /* Budget normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "domestic_gross_2013" INTEGER /* Domestic box office gross normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "international_gross_2013" INTEGER /* International box office gross normalized to 2013 dollars */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company for the movie */,
  "distribution_company" TEXT /* Distribution company for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES movies ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_production_company FOREIGN KEY ("production_company") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_distribution_company FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_company") REFERENCES distribution_companies ("distribution_company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "period_codes" (
  "period_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period code */,
  "period_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the period code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decade_codes" (
  "decade_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade code */,
  "decade_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., finance, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_imdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("imdb_id") REFERENCES movies ("imdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflation_rates" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the inflation rate applies to */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for converting to 2013 dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_companies" (
  "distribution_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution company */,
  "distribution_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_company_id")
)
